title: acmella brachyglossa
intro: Acmella brachyglossa, also known as the toothache plant, is a tropical plant species native to South America. The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to its leaves, which contain bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Acmella brachyglossa include its ability to numb the mouth and throat, making it a traditional treatment for toothaches and sore throats. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to its potential interactions with other medications.
